description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this lotto shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love! Product Details White shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and perforations Padded tongue and inner Foamy rubber midsole TPU outsole with patterned lugs Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
